problem id: 6a186446
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(1)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00111011 -> 10011111
  10111100 -> 01011111
  11010111 -> 01101011
  00001110 -> 11000111
  10110000 -> 01111101
  01000011 -> 01110011
  10111000 -> 01011101
  11000000 -> 11111100
  01001011 -> 01110111
  10101110 -> 01010111

query: 10100110
predicted answer: 01110111
